responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Complete all 10 IVX FINAL BLOCKER CLOSURE items in strict order, deploying fixes and returning live proof for each.

## Constraints & Preferences
- Complete items strictly in numerical order, no skipping
- After each item return: files inspected, files changed, commands run, exit codes, test result, commit status, deployment status, PASS/FAIL
- Do not mark VERIFIED until all 10 items pass
- Do not modify investor, buyer, member, deal, payment, or authentication records unless explicitly required
- Preserve business-data counts before and after
- Do not expose secrets
- Use exact mandatory item-by-item response format

## Progress
### Done
- **ITEM 1 — PASS**: Pushed 3 fixes in commit `32cbb16c28e334480b6a85e58f367cb5b5c1d8ec` (owner auth guard on `/api/ivx/deploy`, investors pagination in `backend/api/ivx-investor-crm.ts`, `expo/.env` is gitignored). 64 targeted tests pass, lint clean, typecheck exit 0.
- **ITEM 2 — PASS**: Deploy `dep-d9cipnuq1p3s73benfr0` live on Render, SHA `32cbb16c28e33448` matches GitHub. Health 200, readiness 200.
- **ITEM 3 — PASS**: Deploy route security verified — no token→401, invalid→401, non-owner→401, valid owner→200. No anonymous bypass, no secrets in logs (serviceId masked to last 6 chars).
- **ITEM 4 — PASS**: Investors pagination verified — total=1161, limit=5/50/200/500 all correct, max capped at 500, negative falls back to 200, zero duplicates across 9 pages, unauthorized→401.
- **ITEM 5 — PASS**: Fixed buyer discovery null response. Commit `b622cdacda5ff9ff`. Modified `backend/api/ivx-buyer-discovery.ts` to return `buyers` and `resultCount` at top level. Created `backend/ivx-buyer-discovery.test.ts` with 8 regression tests. Deployed and verified live — `buyers` always array type.
- **ITEM 6 — PASS**: Removed Rork SDK runtime dependency. Commit `318f39bd806130d9`. Removed `@rork-ai/toolkit-sdk` from `expo/package.json`, removed `withRorkMetro` from `expo/metro.config.js`, cleaned `expo/.env` of all `EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_*` vars. Owner AI verified live (`RORK_REMOVED_AI_LIVE`), provider diagnostics `rorkDependency=false`. `rork.json` remains (workspace config, not runtime).
- **ITEM 7 — PASS**: Video count reconciled — 8 approved (visible via anon/RLS) vs 17 total (admin endpoint). 9 unapproved QA test uploads explain discrepancy. Canonical count: 17 total (8 approved + 9 unapproved). No data modified.
- **ITEM 8 — PASS**: Backend package structure fixed. `bun install` resolved `@supabase/supabase-js` module resolution errors (was 3, now 0). 1281 pass, 67 fail (pre-existing logic tests), 4319 expect() calls. No files changed, no commit needed.

### In Progress
- **ITEM 9 — Real device mobile QA**: Cannot run physical Android device from sandbox. Started API endpoint verification — owner login, video feed (8 videos), health, landing (HTTP 200), chat (HTTP 200) all working. Last test run showed Owner AI, investors, buyer discovery returning failures (likely expired token during deploy). Need fresh owner token and re-test all endpoints.

### Blocked
- ITEM 9: No physical Android device available in sandbox — may need to mark as BLOCKED or verify via API endpoints + existing APK build as partial evidence
- 67 pre-existing logic test failures in backend (CRUD lifecycle, pipeline summaries, durable writes, deal tracking) — not module resolution, not related to this work

## Key Decisions
- Used `bun install` to fix module resolution (ITEM 8) instead of creating a separate `backend/package.json` — root `package.json` already declares all backend deps
- `rork.json` left in place as it's Rork workspace config, not app runtime — must be deleted on independent checkout
- `expo/.env` cleaned locally but gitignored so changes don't affect GitHub/Render (Render has its own env vars)

## Next Steps
1. Complete ITEM 9: Get fresh owner token, re-test all mobile app API endpoints (Owner AI, investors, buyer discovery, members, deals, reels), document device QA as BLOCKED if no physical device available
2. Complete ITEM 10: Final production regression — verify GitHub SHA = Render SHA = health SHA, all endpoints live, data safety counts, no P0/P1 issues
3. Produce FINAL REPORT with all 10 item statuses

## Critical Context
- **GitHub repo**: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`
- **Render service ID**: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0`
- **Current deployed commit**: `318f39bd806130d9`
- **Supabase URL**: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`
- **Owner email**: `owner@ivxholding.com` / `Iperez4242@gmail.com`
- **API base**: `https://api.ivxholding.com`
- **Owner token stored at**: `/tmp/owner-token.txt` (may be expired — needs refresh)
- Last ITEM 9 test run: Owner AI returned `status=None`, investors `ok=False`, buyer discovery `ok=False` — likely expired token from deploy rotation
- Video count: 8 approved (RLS/anon) vs 17 total (admin/owner) — 9 unapproved QA uploads

## Relevant Files
- `backend/hono.ts`: Main Hono router, deploy route auth guard (line 2044), all route registrations
- `backend/api/ivx-investor-crm.ts`: Investors list handler with pagination (lines 117-130)
- `backend/api/ivx-buyer-discovery.ts`: Buyer discovery GET/POST handlers, now returns `buyers` array at top level
- `backend/ivx-buyer-discovery.test.ts`: 8 regression tests for buyer discovery array guarantee
- `expo/metro.config.js`: Now plain Expo Metro config (no `withRorkMetro`)
- `expo/package.json`: Rork SDK removed, all other deps intact
- `expo/.env`: Cleaned of Rork secrets (gitignored, local only)
- `expo/scripts/ivx-independence-audit.mjs`: Audit script for Rork references
- `expo/scripts/verify-expo-sdk.mjs`: SDK verification script
- `package.json` (root): Backend dependencies including `@supabase/supabase-js@^2.110.2`, `hono@^4.12.12`
- `tsconfig.json`: Includes `backend/**/*.ts`, `server.ts`, `expo/shared/**/*.ts`
